/tmp/codeql-scratch-2aabc97755630c34/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/sha256.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/file_load.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/string_extract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/diff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ByteScope.dir/src/ui.cpp.o -o ByteScope  libimgui_lib.a libimplot_lib.a -lpthread -ldl libimgui_lib.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so -ldl
